bookSourceComment:
起点小说中转书源
	后端: https://no.skybook.qzz.io
	数据来源: 起点中文网（通过skybook中转API）
	特点: 搜索结果已含完整详情信息（封面/简介/分类/字数）
	      详情页用搜索结果过滤，不需要额外detail接口
exploreUrl:
玄幻::@js:buildRequest(backend + '/69/search?key=玄幻&page={{page}}')

jsLib:
const backend = 'https://no.skybook.qzz.io';
function buildRequest(url) { return url; }

ruleBookInfo.author: $.author
ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
// baseUrl = data:;base64,{b64},{...}
// 从搜索结果重新按articleid过滤详情
var bid = java.base64Decode(baseUrl.split(',')[1]);
var name = java.getString('$.articlename', result);
result = java.ajax(buildRequest(backend + '/69/search?key=' + encodeURIComponent(name) + '&page=1'));
var list = JSON.parse(result).list;
for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) {
  if (list[i].articleid == Number(bid)) {
    result = JSON.stringify(list[i]);
    break;
  }
}
</js>
ruleBookInfo.name: $.articlename

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
var bid = java.base64Decode(baseUrl.split(',')[1]);
result = java.ajax(buildRequest(backend + '/69/catalog?book_id=' + bid));
JSON.parse(result).list.reduce(function(arr, item) {
    var title = item.chaptername;
    var url = item.articleid + '/' + item.chapterid;
    arr.push(JSON.stringify({
        title: title,
        url: 'data:;base64,' + java.base64Encode(url) + ',{"type":"my69c"}'
    }));
    return arr;
}, []);
</js>
